=== PREFLOP | Small Blind | A♠ A♥ ===
Pot: 48.5 BB | Odds: 1.4:1
Hand: Pocket As (premium_pair, strength 1.00)
Archetype: four_bet_five_bet (confidence 0.90)
Actions: Fold | Call 33.5 | Raise 58.0-100.0
GTO (preflop-handclass): call: 98%, fold: 1% → call
Action stories:
  fold: "I'm not willing to pay this price. My hand isn't strong enough for this pot."
  call: "I'm flatting a big raise. My hand is strong enough to continue but not to escalate."
  raise: "I'm re-raising big. My story says I have a premium hand — or a fearless bluff."

COACH (clear): You're on the Small Blind with A♠ A♥. There have been 3 raises — Button has 34 BB in. This is a four bet five bet pot where stacks are on the line. Hijack raiseed 3 BB. Cutoff raiseed 10 BB. Button raiseed 34 BB. Your Pocket As is strong. You have a clear story to tell. Call. The price is right to continue. GTO confirms: call 98% of the time.
